questions.prompt: Which artist released the album Thriller in 1982?
questions.explanation: Thriller remains one of the best-selling albums of all time.

questions.prompt: Which band recorded the song Bohemian Rhapsody?
questions.explanation: Queen released Bohemian Rhapsody on the 1975 album A Night at the Opera.

questions.prompt: How many symphonies did Ludwig van Beethoven complete?
questions.explanation: Beethoven completed nine symphonies, ending with the Ninth and its Ode to Joy.

questions.prompt: Which instrument has eighty-eight keys in its standard form?
questions.explanation: A standard modern piano has 52 white keys and 36 black keys.

questions.prompt: Who sang the 2010 hit Rolling in the Deep?
questions.explanation: Rolling in the Deep was the lead single from Adele's album 21.

questions.prompt: Who was the drummer for The Beatles?
questions.explanation: Ringo Starr joined The Beatles in 1962, replacing Pete Best.

questions.prompt: Which singer is known as the King of Rock and Roll?
questions.explanation: Elvis Presley earned the nickname in the 1950s.
Vivaldi composed the four violin concertos around 1723, publishing them in 1725 as part of Op. 8.

questions.prompt: Who was the lead singer of Nirvana?
questions.explanation: Kurt Cobain fronted Nirvana until his death in 1994. Dave Grohl was the drummer.

questions.prompt: Which artist recorded the song Purple Rain?
questions.explanation: Purple Rain was the title track of Prince's 1984 album and film.
